description: Mistral AI provides language models and related products for building AI applications, plus Vibe and Studio products for coding assistants, agents, and API access. Its platform supports hosted model inference and developer tooling for integrating those capabilities into applications and workflows.
summary: Mistral exposes a bearer-token authenticated HTTP API at https://api.mistral.ai/v1 and a Python-distributed `vibe` CLI for Vibe Code; no public GraphQL API, MCP server endpoint, or machine-readable OpenAPI spec URL was found in the docs searched.
